items.title: Wikipedia blackout could hurt how AI engines like ChatGPT understand crypto
items.description: Wikipedia observes guidelines on crypto coverage that date back many years and may now be outdated, according to the report.

items.title: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets
items.description: The joint roadmap aims to reduce regulatory friction for tokenized assets while strengthening ties between the world's two largest financial centers.

items.title: JPMorgan says Hyperliquid's rise threatens Circle's USDC economics
items.description: Hyperliquid's deal with Circle and Coinbase creates a "prisoner's dilemma" that puts pressure on earnings from the dollar-pegged stablecoin.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation spinout EthSystems targets banks with blockchain privacy technology
items.description: The spinout comes amid one of the biggest organizational shakeups at the Ethereum Foundation in years.

items.title: For pension funds, tokenization’s real play is balance-sheet management, Fidelity’s Lai says
items.description: Fidelity International’s Giselle Lai argues that the most compelling long-term use case for tokenized funds is balance-sheet management for large, global institutions, not 24/7 liquidity.

items.title: Hut 8 price target hiked to $165 at Benchmark as AI pivot reshapes valuation
items.description: Mark Palmer said Hut 8's Beacon Point project transforms the company into an AI infrastructure platform with a long growth runway.

items.title: U.S. June CPI fell 0.4%, likely cooling move toward Fed rate hikes
items.description: This morning's report could go a long way toward determining whether the Federal Reserve raises interest rates at its late-July meeting.

items.title: ECB picks firms including Deutsche Bank, Revolut for digital euro pilot
items.description: The pilot will test a beta version of the digital euro for online, offline, in-store, and e-commerce payments with ECB and central bank staff as users.

items.title: CleanSpark shares jump 22% after $6.6B Georgia data center lease
items.description: The Bitcoin miner’s Georgia agreement with an undisclosed investment-grade technology company expands its footprint in AI and high-performance computing infrastructure.

items.title: Anchorage Digital expands Tron support with institutional TRX staking
items.description: Institutions can now stake Tron's native token directly from Anchorage's custody platform as the company expands support for one of the largest USDT settlement networks.

items.title: Bitcoin jumps on lowest US CPI since 2020 as traders stay wary of $64K failure
items.description: BTC price action returned to $64,000 on low US CPI inflation but traders stayed wary of rejection at key resistance.

items.title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
items.description: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

items.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
items.description: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?

items.title: Humanity Protocol to prioritize operational security following $36M hack
items.description: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

items.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
items.description: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

items.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
items.description: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

items.title: Warsh pledges Fed policy 'regime change' to rid inflation 'tax' on American people
items.description: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.

items.title: Oil prices off highs after Trump abandons 20% protection fee on Strait of Hormuz traffic
items.description: Oil prices rose on Tuesday after U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to impose shipping fees in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: IBM stock craters 23% after issuing second-quarter earnings warning
items.description: CEO blamed the shortfall on weakness in the software and infrastructure business because clients shifted money toward hardware purchases.

items.title: Supreme Court Justice Barrett says 'the threat level is really high' in budget testimony
items.description: Supreme Court Justices Amy Coney Barrett and Elena Kagan are testifying about the high court's budget request, which includes higher spending for security.

items.title: Chamath Palihapitiya says soaring AI token spend will hit companies' earnings
items.description: Palihapitiya is part of a growing chorus of investors and tech executives who are cautioning that the tokenmaxxing era is coming to an end.

items.title: E. Jean Carroll receives $5.6M from Trump in sex abuse, defamation case: Court filing
items.description: A federal judge recently ordered Trump to pay Carroll, rejecting his last-ditch efforts while noting that he "has been stalling this case for years."

items.title: United Airlines' new upsell: Keeping other travelers out of the middle seat
items.description: United Airlines will allow customers to pay more to keep the middle seat open on its Airbus A321XLRs

items.title: Warren Buffett is accelerating his charitable donations with aim to give away Berkshire wealth by 2034
items.description: Warren Buffett is speeding up the pace of his annual donations of Berkshire Hathaway shares to four family foundations, giving them a total of almost $6 billion now.

items.title: Ukraine targets Russian shipping in ‘unprecedented’ drone assault

items.description: The foes are in their most dangerous period of fighting since a fragile April truce. Many of their strikes are designed to send signals

items.transcript_reason:
Could not retrieve a transcript for the video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=prxbky7kj5o! This is most likely caused by:

YouTube is blocking requests from your IP. This usually is due to one of the following reasons:
- You have done too many requests and your IP has been blocked by YouTube
- You are doing requests from an IP belonging to a cloud provider (like AWS, Google Cloud Platform, Azure, etc.). Unfortunately, most IPs from cloud providers are blocked by YouTube.

There are two things you can do to work around this:
1. Use proxies to hide your IP address, as explained in the "Working around IP bans" section of the README (https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api?tab=readme-ov-file#working-around-ip-bans-requestblocked-or-ipblocked-exception).
2. (NOT RECOMMENDED) If you authenticate your requests using cookies, you will be able to continue doing requests for a while. However, YouTube will eventually permanently ban the account that you have used to authenticate with! So only do this if you don't mind your account being banned!

If you are sure that the described cause is not responsible for this error and that a transcript should be retrievable, please create an issue at https://github.com/jdepoix/youtube-transcript-api/issues. Please add which version of youtube_transcript_api you are using and provide the information needed to replicate the error. Also make sure that there are no open issues which already describe your problem!

items.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
items.description: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
items.description: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

items.title: Lindsey Graham died from a rare heart condition. Here’s how to know if you’re at risk.
items.description: Aortic dissections are extremely rare; however, people with a family history or who have been diagnosed with certain genetic syndromes have an elevated risk

items.description: IBM’s stock plunges after a preliminary release of profit and revenue that were well below expectations.

items.title: US inflation fell more than expected to 3.5% in June as petrol prices tumbled
items.description: Traders rein in bets on Fed rate rises as easing energy costs help tame price surges spurred by Middle East war

items.title: Ann Widdecombe killed in ‘targeted attack’, counterterror police say
items.description: Ex-Conservative minister and Reform spokesperson was found dead at her home in Devon on Thursday

items.title: IBM shares plunge 25% as customers shift spending to AI
items.description: Chief executive Arvind Krishna says company ‘faltered’ as clients raced to buy servers and storage

items.title: Wall Street banks smash records on stock trading boom
items.description: Earnings at JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Citigroup and BofA benefit from AI frenzy and SpaceX IPO

items.title: Trump says US to abandon proposed Strait of Hormuz cargo fee
items.description: President says he will ‘replace’ plan with investment from Gulf states into the US

items.title: New York becomes first US state to suspend data centre development
items.description: Governor Kathy Hochul signs one-year moratorium on new construction amid backlash over infrastructure needs

items.title: Big banks and Big Tech are surfing the same wave
items.description: Wall Street is no longer the only industry reaching into every corner of the economy

items.title: Oil touches $87 as battle for Strait of Hormuz alarms energy markets
items.description: Brent crude climbs after US responds to Iranian attacks on tankers with fresh round of strikes

items.title: What to know about the Fed chairman’s testimony.
The Fed’s new chairman is asking for advice.
items.description: Five new task forces are focused on topics that Kevin M. Warsh, the chairman of the Federal Reserve, has said are “central to the broad conduct of monetary policy.”

items.title: Warsh Reiterates Fed’s Pledge to Get Inflation Down but Doesn’t Specify How
items.description: Kevin M. Warsh, in his first testimony to Congress as chairman of the Federal Reserve, did not shed light on whether he supported higher interest rates to tame price pressures.

items.title: Paramount vs. the States
items.description: An effort to block the media giant’s planned takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery underscores how states are taking a more active role in antitrust regulation.

items.title: Chai Discovery, an A.I. Drug Start-Up, Raises $400 Million
items.description: The fund-raising values the company at $3.8 billion and underscores investor interest in using artificial intelligence to tackle problems like drug discovery.

items.title: Big Banks Smash Earnings Records, but ‘Tectonic’ Risks Loom
items.description: The quarterly results reflect the dichotomy between geopolitical uncertainty and the stable American economy.

items.title: Inflation Slowed During Pause in War With Iran
items.description: The Consumer Price Index fell to a 3.5 percent annual increase in June, and prices marked their biggest drop from a month earlier since 2020.

items.title: China Purges Top Official Over Corruption and Sex Charges
items.description: Ma Xingrui is the third member of the Politburo to be purged since 2022. He once led the Xinjiang region and was previously head of China’s space program.
